user_query:
I want to introduce a new feature called "Team Calendar Digest" using a spec-driven change workflow. Please read everything under input/ and produce a complete change package under output/ with the exact structure and contents below.

Read:
- input/product_brief.md
- input/spec_checklist.txt
- input/existing_changes.csv
- input/company_tone.md

Create these files (and only write under output/):
1) output/lightspec/changes/team-calendar-digest/spec.md
   - First line must be: "# Team Calendar Digest"
   - Include the following section headings in this order (each as level-2 headings, i.e., starting with "## "):
     Context
     Problem
     Goals
     Non-Goals
     Requirements
     Acceptance Criteria
     Dependencies
     Risks
     Rollout
     Rollback
     Metrics
     Open Questions
   - Include a "Source:" line that references input/product_brief.md
   - Write in a human-benefit style consistent with input/company_tone.md and translate technical ideas into user value.

2) output/lightspec/changes/team-calendar-digest/change.json
   - Valid JSON object containing at least: name ("Team Calendar Digest"), slug ("team-calendar-digest"), status ("draft"), created (ISO 8601 date string).

3) output/lightspec/changes/team-calendar-digest/acceptance_criteria.json
   - A JSON array with at least 5 items.
   - At least one item must use BDD phrasing with "Given", "When", and "Then".

4) output/lightspec/changes/team-calendar-digest/validate-report.txt
   - A summary of completeness against input/spec_checklist.txt.
   - Must contain two lines in this exact label format:
     "Sections: <number>"
     "Missing: <none or comma-separated list>"
   - If every required section is present, report "Missing: none".

5) output/lightspec/changes/team-calendar-digest/apply-plan.md
   - An ordered implementation plan that does not modify code yet.
   - Include a checklist with at least 5 steps using lines that start with "- [ ] ".
   - Include a dedicated section titled "Files to change" listing at least 3 plausible relative repository paths (no absolute paths).
   - Include the exact sentence: "Do not apply without user confirmation."

Notes:
- Choose the slug based on the feature name (use team-calendar-digest). Ensure it does not conflict with anything listed in input/existing_changes.csv.
- Do not modify any project files. Only create the files above under output/.
- If anything in product_brief.md is ambiguous, call it out under the "Open Questions" section in spec.md.
